/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/tsmp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/adu06cal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/adu07cal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/atmfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/atsfilename.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/atsheader72.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/atsheader75.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/atsheader80.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/coherency.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/date_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/eDateTime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/efp05cal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/emi_bfcal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/emimt24header.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/emisyscal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/fgs01cal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/fgs02cal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/fubheader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/icalibration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/itsheader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/koordi.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/ltscal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/mfs07cal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/mtstd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/mtxcal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/my_valarray_double.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/plaincal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/spectra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/string_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/tsdata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tsmp.dir/tsheader.cpp.o -o tsmp  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
